title: Document Controller (Software Products)
location_raw: Newcastle upon Tyne, Tyne and Wear
description_raw:
Sage Group plc require a Document Controller to support their software product release management function on a fixed-term contract basis.

The Document Controller will manage technical documentation for software product releases, including user guides, API documentation, release notes, and compliance artefacts for Sage's cloud accounting and ERP platforms.

Key responsibilities:
- Maintain the document management system for software product technical documentation
- Control version management of user guides, release notes, and API specifications
- Coordinate documentation sign-off from product managers and software developers
- Manage the product documentation register in Confluence
- Ensure GDPR and data protection compliance documentation is current
- Liaise with software development teams on sprint-based documentation updates

Profile:
- 2+ years as Document Controller in a software or technology environment
- Experience with Confluence, SharePoint, or equivalent documentation platforms
- Familiarity with agile software development processes
- Attention to detail; strong organisational skills

Rate: £200–£240/day
Duration: 6 months
Start: 4 August 2026
Location: Newcastle (hybrid — 2 days per week in office)
